message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant RMB #LightBlue
participant Node #LightBlue

Client ->> RMB : Create an RMB message\n(cmd: zos.deployment.deploy, dat: base64(json(deployment)))\n.. .. . 
RMB->Node  : Decode payload(dat).\nSo node receive a deployment object \n... ... 

activate Node  
    Note right of Node   : Verify hash against contract hash\nVerify signature of the twin
    
     loop If valid   
        activate Node    
            Node <- - Node : Deploy     
         deactivate Node       
      end
      
deactivate Node  

node --> rmb : Accepted Or Error


rmb -->> client : Response from the node



client-->rmb:Get Deployment (cmd: zos.deployment.get)
note left of this : Get method call to get response back 


rmb<-node:get response
rmb-->>client:response




@enduml
